name: Cloudflare - OpenNext
snippet: All minor and patch versions of Next.js 16 and the latest minors of Next.js 14 and 15 are supported. Next.js 14 support will be dropped Q1 2026.

name: Troubleshooting - OpenNext
snippet: The Cloudflare Account you are deploying to is on the Workers Free plan, which limits the size of each Worker to 3 MiB (opens in a new tab).
